enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ennamo Nadakkirathe'?

The song expresses the excitement and joy of falling in love, capturing the playful essence of romance.

How does this song fit into the plot of 'Sandakozhi'?

In the movie, this song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, showcasing their chemistry and love story.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Shaan and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his catchy and melodious tunes.

When was 'Ennamo Nadakkirathe' released?

The song was released on September 14, 2025.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Ennamo Nadakkirathe', the protagonist revels in the thrill of love, as the upbeat melody and romantic lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and excitement. The song beautifully captures the essence of youthful romance, making it a perfect backdrop for the blossoming relationship in Sandakozhi. With Shaan's energetic vocals, the track conveys a sense of celebration and happiness. This song not only enhances the narrative of the film but also resonates with anyone who has experienced the magic of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennamo Nadakkirathe from Sandakozhi is a vibrant celebration of love that captures the essence of youthful romance. With Shaan's captivating vocals and Yuvan's infectious music, this track is sure to get you dancing. Experience the magic of this unique collaboration that brings together heartfelt lyrics and an upbeat melody.
stanzaMeanings: Something is happening, I like it. Something is happening, I like everything about it.
Who is talking? Who is listening? Everyone is listening to your voice. Yeah, yeah. Who is showing up? Who is going away? Everyone knows about you. Yeah..
Love has come and settled in the eyes. Like a flower placed in a house, love has built a home. Even if love is said to be a curse, it doesn't close the door when it is shut.
Something is happening, I like it. Something is happening, I like everything about it.
One glance.. one glance, it falls like a shadow on the head. Another glance, that glance will come back to me again.
Oh, if you change me, I will be beautiful. If you change me in trouble, I will lose my wings. Both my legs are stuck in love. This is not magic or a spell, oh love is a trap.
In the beginning, slowly I woke up to flowers in the shop yesterday. Today, I saw your hand in the market, and I also came to the fair.
What is my name? Someone asked me. I told them your name and they laughed. I was born here to live with you, my heart is not beating because of this love.
Who is talking? Who is listening? Everyone is listening to your voice. Yeah, yeah. Who is showing up? Who is going away? Everyone knows about you. Yeah..
Something is happening, I like it. Something is happening, I like everything about it.
